name: Riskified E-commerce Fraud Prevention API
what_it_does: Riskified e-commerce fraud prevention REST API for online merchants to get real-time approve/decline fraud decisions with 100% chargeback guarantee on approved orders using machine learning, behavioral analytics, and a global merchant network for risk-free fraud-free order management. Enables AI agents to manage order submission for real-time fraud decision automation, handle chargeback claim submission for loss recovery automation, access order update for post-decision risk signal update automation, retrieve order decision history for fraud analytics automation, manage account action for account takeover protection automation, handle login event for behavioral pattern analysis automation, access decline challenge for borderline order second-look automation, retrieve merchant analytics for fraud trend reporting automation, manage refund and cancellation for order lifecycle automation, and integrate Riskified with Shopify, Magento, Salesforce Commerce, and enterprise e-commerce platforms for end-to-end fraud-free commerce automation.
use_cases: Getting real-time fraud decisions with chargeback guarantee from order protection agents
Submitting orders for Riskified approval from e-commerce checkout agents
Reporting chargebacks for guaranteed reimbursement from dispute management agents
Detecting account takeover via login event analysis from security agents
not_for: Payment-level fraud (Riskified is order-level fraud; use Kount for payment-level)
SMB simple fraud rules (Riskified is enterprise ML-powered with chargeback guarantee model)
Identity verification/KYC (use Persona or Onfido for document identity verification)
best_when: An e-commerce merchant wanting AI agents to automate fraud risk assessment with 100% chargeback liability guarantee on approved orders through Riskified's machine learning fraud prevention API.
avoid_when: CHARGEBACK GUARANTEE ONLY ON SUBMITTED AND APPROVED ORDERS: Riskified chargeback guarantee applies only to orders explicitly submitted to Riskified and approved (APPROVE decision); automated orders not submitted to Riskified or submitted but declined/skipped are not guaranteed; automated selective submission creates uneven chargeback coverage. ORDER SUBMISSION TIMING MATTERS: Riskified order should be submitted at checkout (pre-fulfillment) for optimal decision; automated post-fulfillment submission creates retrospective analysis without fraud prevention value. RISKIFIED WEBHOOK DECISION IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Riskified may return synchronous or asynchronous (webhook-based) decision depending on order complexity; automated checkout must handle both sync and async decision paths; automated synchronous-only assumption creates missed decisions for complex orders. CHARGEBACK CLAIM REQUIRES DOCUMENTATION: Riskified chargeback reimbursement requires submitting claim with supporting documentation within timeframe; automated chargeback recovery must track and submit claims timely; automated missed claim submission creates forfeited guarantee reimbursement.

auth.notes: Riskified uses Shop Domain + HMAC-SHA256 signature for authentication. REST API with JSON. Tel Aviv, Israel HQ. Founded 2012 by Eido Gal and Assaf Feldman. NASDAQ: RSKD ($165M raised pre-IPO). Products: Order fraud decision, chargeback guarantee, account protect, policy protect, PSD2 challenge. SDKs: Ruby, PHP, Node.js, Python, Java, .NET. PCI DSS. SOC2. GDPR. Serves enterprise e-commerce (Shopify Plus, ASOS, Wish). Competes with Signifyd for e-commerce fraud.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of approved GMV (typically 0.4-0.8% of protected revenue); chargeback guarantee included
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv IL. NASDAQ: RSKD. GMV-percentage pricing with chargeback guarantee. Enterprise annual contract.

performance.rate_limits: High-throughput per merchant; checkout fraud decision APIs optimized for speed; webhooks for decisions

known_agent_gotchas: HMAC-SHA256 SIGNATURE USES SHOP DOMAIN: Riskified authentication uses HMAC-SHA256 signature computed with shop domain and auth token; automated request must compute signature with correct shop domain; automated wrong shop domain in signature creates authentication failure

ASYNC WEBHOOK DECISION PATH: Riskified may return immediate decision or use async webhook for complex orders; automated checkout must implement both sync response handling and async webhook listener; automated sync-only implementation creates missed async decisions

ORDER ID MUST MATCH ORIGINAL SUBMISSION: Riskified order updates and chargebacks require same order_id as original submission; automated chargeback claim must use original order_id; automated different order_id creates order not found for chargeback reimbursement

CHARGEBACK CLAIM SUBMISSION DEADLINE: Riskified chargeback reimbursement requires claim submission within defined timeframe after chargeback notification; automated chargeback tracking must submit claims promptly; automated delayed claim submission creates forfeited guarantee

LOGIN EVENT IMPROVES ACCOUNT PROTECT: Riskified account protect quality improves with login event submission; automated account protection must submit login events in addition to order events; automated order-only submission creates degraded account takeover detection
agent_readiness.security_notes: E-commerce fraud. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. HMAC-SHA256. US/EU. Transaction and behavioral data. NASDAQ listed.

security_score_components.security_notes: E-commerce fraud. PCI-DSS, SOC2. HMAC-SHA256. US. Transaction and risk data.
